creator: pete@twisted.org.uk
text: !!! I actually saw this effect when I upgraded. My Windows 10 VM booted fine after the 12.2 upgrade, but my OpenSUSE install just crashed. I ended up deleting it and installing Ubuntu instead, using the setting which worked for the Windows VM, as I assumed it was my inexperience with Linux, not a reoccurrence of a bug in the port. Damn, wish I had said something at the time now.
